context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the sticky buy bar using getBoundingClientRect scroll detection, aria accessibility attributes, safe-area-inset-bottom for iOS, translateY CSS animation, and the mobile-first PDP two-column layout with sticky image panel.

checklist.name: getBoundingClientRect detection
checklist.description: The scroll handler calls getBoundingClientRect() on the primary Add to Cart button ref to determine visibility (NOT checking scrollY or offsetTop directly)

checklist.name: Visibility condition
checklist.description: The sticky bar becomes visible when the primary button's rect.bottom < 0 (button has scrolled above the viewport top)

checklist.name: Passive scroll listener
checklist.description: The scroll event listener is registered with `{ passive: true }` option

checklist.name: aria-hidden management
checklist.description: The sticky bar container uses aria-hidden={true} when not visible and aria-hidden={false} (or no attribute) when visible

checklist.name: tabIndex management
checklist.description: Interactive elements inside the sticky bar use tabIndex={-1} when the bar is hidden and tabIndex={0} (or default) when visible

checklist.name: CSS translateY animation
checklist.description: The sticky bar is hidden via `transform: translateY(100%)` and shown via `transform: translateY(0)` (NOT via display:none or visibility:hidden alone)

checklist.name: Safe area inset bottom
checklist.description: The sticky bar CSS uses `env(safe-area-inset-bottom)` in the padding-bottom to account for iPhone home indicator

checklist.name: Fixed positioning
checklist.description: The sticky bar uses `position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0` (anchored to the bottom of the viewport)

checklist.name: z-index 50
checklist.description: The sticky bar has z-index: 50 (matching the specified value, not an arbitrary high number like 999)

checklist.name: PDP mobile single column
checklist.description: The PDP layout uses a single column (`grid-template-columns: 1fr`) as the base mobile style

checklist.name: PDP desktop two-panel
checklist.description: The PDP layout switches to `grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr` at 768px (md breakpoint)

checklist.name: Sticky images panel
checklist.description: The images/gallery panel in the PDP uses `position: sticky` on desktop so it stays in view while the right panel scrolls

checklist.name: Dynamic viewport height
checklist.description: Any full-height layout element uses `100dvh` (not just `100vh`) to handle iOS Safari's dynamic toolbar
